title: tetradium glabrifolium
intro: Tetradium glabrifolium, also known as the Chinese pepper or Chinese prickly ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, including pain relief, anti-anxiety, and improved cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Tetradium glabrifolium is often used as a spice or infused in teas, and it can also be found in traditional Chinese medicinal formulas.
